name: Spice Cookies with Pumpkin Dip - Part 2
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream butter and sugar in a mixing bowl until smooth.
2. Add eggs, one at a time, beating well after each addition.
3. Stir in molasses; mix until combined.
4. In a separate bowl, combine flour, baking soda, cinnamon, ginger, cloves, and salt.
5. Gradually add the dry ingredients to the butter mixture, mixing until just combined.
6. Chill the dough overnight.
7. Shape the dough into 1 inch balls and roll in sugar.
8. Place the cookie balls about 2 inches apart on ungreased baking sheets.
9. Bake at 375 degrees Fahrenheit for 6 minutes or until edges begin to brown.
10. Allow cookies to cool for 2 minutes before transferring them to a wire rack.
11. For the dip, beat cream cheese in a mixing bowl until smooth.
12. Stir in pumpkin pie mix; beat until combined.
13. Add sugar, cinnamon, and ginger; beat until smooth.
14. Serve with cooked cookies. Store leftover dip in the refrigerator. Yield: approximately 20 dozen (3 cups dip)
